# Stand Out Exterior Cleaning

> Locally owned pressure washing and soft washing company in Denver, North Carolina, serving the entire Lake Norman area. Founded in 2020 by Ridge Curwood. Fully insured, 5-star rated, 500+ properties cleaned.

Stand Out Exterior Cleaning LLC is a residential and commercial exterior cleaning business specializing in soft washing and pressure washing. We use the right technique for every surface — low-pressure soft wash for siding, roofs, and delicate materials; high-pressure surface cleaning for concrete driveways and patios. Every job comes with a 100% satisfaction guarantee and free estimates.

Primary service area: Denver, NC (headquarters), Mooresville, Huntersville, Cornelius, Iron Station, Sherrills Ford, Lincolnton, Hickory, Lake Norman, and Charlotte.

Phone: 704-917-9649
Email: info@standoutexterior.com
Address: 7238 Windy Pine Cir, Denver, NC 28037

## Services

- [House Washing](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/house-washing): Soft-wash method safely removes algae, mold, and mildew from vinyl, brick, stucco, Hardie board, and painted wood siding.
- [Roof Cleaning](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/roof-cleaning): ARMA-approved soft-wash method removes black streaks, moss, and Gloeocapsa magma algae without damaging shingles or voiding warranties.
- [Driveway Cleaning](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/driveway-cleaning): Commercial surface-cleaner removes oil, tire marks, red clay, mold, and grime from concrete, pavers, and asphalt.
- [Gutter Cleaning](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/gutter-cleaning): Hand-scooped debris removal, verified downspout flush, and optional gutter-face brightening treatment.
- [Window Cleaning](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/window-cleaning): Pure-water system delivers streak-free, spot-free results on interior and exterior windows.
- [Fence Washing](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/fence-washing): Wood, vinyl, aluminum, and chain-link fence cleaning and stain preparation.
- [Paver Cleaning, Sealing & Sanding](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/paver-cleaning): Full paver restoration including deep cleaning, polymeric sand replacement, and professional sealer application.
- [Brick Cleaning](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/brick-cleaning): Mold and efflorescence removal, plus new-construction mortar haze cleaning with NMD 80 detergent.
- [Commercial Pressure Washing](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/commercial-pressure-washing): Storefronts, sidewalks, parking lots, dumpster pads, and recurring maintenance contracts. COI available.
- [Church & Steeple Cleaning](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services/church-cleaning): Specialized church exterior cleaning including steeples, historic masonry, and safety-critical sidewalks and stairs.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.standoutexterior.com/): Company overview, featured services, testimonials, and free estimate form.
- [About](https://www.standoutexterior.com/about): Ridge Curwood's founder story, company values, and "Ridge On The Job" photo gallery.
- [Services Overview](https://www.standoutexterior.com/services): Full list of residential and commercial services with detailed descriptions.
- [Commercial Services](https://www.standoutexterior.com/commercial): Commercial cleaning capabilities, insurance details, and recurring-contract information.
- [Before & After Gallery](https://www.standoutexterior.com/before-after): 150+ real photos from real jobs across Denver and Lake Norman — no stock photography.
- [Reviews](https://www.standoutexterior.com/reviews): Google reviews and customer testimonials from Denver NC and Lake Norman area customers.
- [Contact](https://www.standoutexterior.com/contact): Free estimate form, phone, email, and Google Maps location.

## Why We Stand Out

- Fully insured and workman's comp covered — Certificates of Insurance available on request
- 5.0 Google rating across 124+ verified reviews
- 500+ residential and commercial properties cleaned
- Locally owned and operated since 2020
- Right technique for every surface — we never use high pressure where soft wash is appropriate
- Free estimates, no contracts, satisfaction guaranteed
